title: Cash non-additive risk measures: horizon risk and generalized entropy
snippet: Horizon risk (see arXiv:2301.04971) is studied in the context of cash non-additive fully-dynamic risk measures induced by BSDEs. Furthermore, we introduce a risk measure based on generalized Tsallis entropy which can dynamically evaluate the riskiness of losses considering both horizon risk and interest rate uncertainty. The new q-entropic risk measure on losses can be used as a quantification of capital requirement.
